current_status.test_framework: Enhanced with DL-server and RT throttling management
current_status.test_isolation: Implemented - all tests now disable DL-server and RT throttling

recent_work.session_focus: Implement DL-server and RT throttling test isolation framework
completed_tasks: Updated all 20 functional tests to use setup_test_environment()
Updated test01_wrapper.sh to use unified setup
recent_work.commit: fe9714465574 - tests: Add unified test environment management framework

test_isolation_framework.motivation: Prevent DL-server from interfering with stalld behavior testing
test_isolation_framework.user_requirement: Don't want to think stalld is working correctly when DL-server is actually fixing stalls

implementation.purpose: Unified function to save/disable RT throttling and DL-server
implementation.usage: Called in all tests after start_test() and before require_root()

environment_overrides.STALLD_TEST_KEEP_DL_SERVER: Set to 1 to skip DL-server disable (debugging)
environment_overrides.STALLD_TEST_KEEP_RT_THROTTLING: Set to 1 to skip RT throttling disable (debugging)
use_cases: Debugging test behavior with DL-server enabled
Future tests for DL-server/stalld conflict detection

affected_functions.setup_test_environment: New unified function calling all four functions above

files_modified.test_helpers.sh: Added environment variable docs, override checks, setup_test_environment()
files_modified.README.md: Added Test Environment Management section with examples

previous_session_summary.issue: test01 timeout due to kworker competition
previous_session_summary.solution: Increased timeout to 180s and documented timing variability

key_findings.kworker_filter_mystery: '-i kworker' filter works correctly - eliminates starvation scenario entirely
key_findings.priority_algorithm: update_cpu_starving_vector() selects task with earliest timestamp
key_findings.timing_issue: Pre-existing kworkers have earlier timestamps, get boosted first

test_isolation.cleanup: Automatic via trap handler in test_helpers.sh

test_framework_architecture.rationale: User requested manual approach for clear intent
test_framework_architecture.alternative_considered: Automatic in start_test() - rejected for being too implicit

stalld_single_threaded_mode.limitation: Can only track one starving task per CPU
stalld_single_threaded_mode.impact: Causes timing variability on loaded systems

future_work.priority_1: Test the framework - run some tests to verify DL-server disable works
future_work.priority_2: Write DL-server conflict tests (stalld + DL-server interaction)
future_work.priority_3: Consider multi-blockee starvation test for loaded system robustness

documentation.test_template: Updated in README.md to include setup_test_environment()

lessons_learned.test_isolation_critical: DL-server can mask stalld failures - must disable for testing
lessons_learned.manual_vs_automatic: Explicit calls better than hidden behavior for test framework
lessons_learned.environment_overrides: Override variables provide flexibility for debugging and special cases
lessons_learned.batch_updates: sed can efficiently update multiple test files at once

environment.dl_server: Present (kernel 6.6+), now disabled by default in tests
